'''Striped Scarf''' is a dyable equipable accessory that makes your dog look lovely.
{{Item
| image = Striped_scarf.png
| id = striped_scarf
| type = Customization
| Subtype = Dyeable
| stackable = 64
}}

== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe
|-
| Wool Carpet <br>+ [[Wool Collar]]
| [[File:Striped_scarf_crafting.png]]
|}
== Usage ==
{{Accessory_use}}

== Trivia ==
* It was introduced in DTN 1.18.30.
